title: leutea cupularis
intro: Leutea cupularis, also known as Chinese club moss or Lycopodiopsida, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the ancient group of lycopods. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Leutea cupularis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Leutea cupularis include teas, infusions, and decoctions, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
